title: Helmeppo Shows His Cruelty
description: On pages 3–6, this part pushes the Shells Town conflict forward as Luffy challenges the fear surrounding Morgan’s Marines.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...Great!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yes sir!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU CERTAINLY ARE, SIR! YOU'RE THE GREAT CAPTAIN MORGAN, SIR!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THEN WHY ARE THE TRIBUTES FROM THE FEASANTS... AHEM... TOWNS-FOLK...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...GETTING SMALLER!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YESSIR, REGARD- ING YOUR TRIBUTES...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: BELIEVE THE TOWNS- PEOPLE ARE NOW TOO DOOR TO RAISE~

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's not a QUESTION of how much they can pay...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's a question of their respect for me!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: DADDY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHAT'S WRONG, HELPPO? WHY THE COMMO- TION?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I want you to kill someone for me!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: HEY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: YOU AGAIN...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: IF THIS IS ABOUT ME JOINING YOUR PIRATE CREW, MY ANSWER IS STILL NO!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: CALL ME LUFFY!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll unite you if you'll join my pirate crew, okay!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You don't listen, boy!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I've got my own mission...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...and it doesn't involve becoming a stinking pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU'RE TOO GOOD TO BE A PIRATE?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You, a bounty hunter? Who everyone thinks is some sort of demon?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I DON'T CARE WHAT PEOPLE THINK.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I've by my own code... I've never done anything I regret, and I don't intend to in the future.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WHICH IS WHY I'LL NEVER BE A PIRATE!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: SORRY, BUT I'VE MADE UP MY MIND! YOU'RE GONNA JOIN MY CREW!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I DON'T CARE WHAT YOU'VE DECIDED!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: HEARD YOU CAN USE A SWORD!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: HMPH! IF I WAN'T TITED UP, I'D SHOW YOU...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So where are your swords now?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THEY TOOK 'EM FROM ME. THE CAPTAIN'S IDIOT SON...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Next to my life, those swords are my dearest tree- sures.

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
